name: Cheesy Tomato & Turkey Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a lightly buttered 9" x 13-inch baking dish, toss together cooked pasta, turkey, tomatoes, cottage cheese, cheddar cheese, green onions, marjoram, and pepper.
2. Sprinkle breadcrumbs on top and dot with butter.
- The casserole may be prepared up to this point, covered, and refrigerated for up to 4 hours.
3. Bake at 350°F until the casserole is bubbling and the top is lightly browned, about 30 minutes.
